description: GASSIT - Web-based rental management platform for Laer Firmengruppe. Full lifecycle: applications, contracts, invoicing, payments (Mollie), dunning, damage, termination, deposits, vendors, LLM lock access. Vue.js + Laravel + MySQL. GDPR-compliant. 7 RBAC roles. Multi-park.

userStories.title: DB schema: users, roles, parks, park_user pivot
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the core auth and multi-park schema so all other tables can reference it.
acceptanceCriteria: Create users table: id, name, email, password, role (enum: admin|main_manager|rental_manager|park_worker|accountant|office_worker|customer_service), active (bool, default true), remember_token, timestamps
Create parks table: id, name, address, city, zip, country, phone, email, bank_iban, bank_bic, bank_owner, logo_path, primary_color (hex), language (default 'de'), timestamps, soft deletes
Create park_user pivot table: user_id, park_id, unique(user_id, park_id) — admin/main_manager access all parks implicitly
Create password_reset_tokens table: email, token, created_at
Create personal_access_tokens table for Laravel Sanctum
Run all migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: unit types, units, unit features, unit photos
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the unit inventory tables so rental stock can be fully described.
acceptanceCriteria: Create unit_types table: id, park_id, name, description, base_rent (decimal), deposit_amount (decimal), size_m2 (decimal), floor_plan_path, timestamps
Create unit_features table: id, unit_type_id, feature (e.g. electricity, heating, wifi), timestamps

Create units table: id, park_id, unit_type_id, unit_number (string), floor (int nullable), building (string nullable), size_m2 (decimal), rent_override (decimal nullable), deposit_override (decimal nullable), status (enum: free|reserved|rented|maintenance|inactive), notes, timestamps, soft deletes
Create unit_photos table: id, unit_id, path, caption, sort_order, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: customers, blacklist, customer documents
userStories.description: As a developer, I need customer and blacklist tables so tenant profiles can be stored GDPR-compliantly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create customers table: id, type (enum: private|company), first_name, last_name, company_name (nullable), dob (date nullable), address, city, zip, country, email, phone, id_number (nullable), tax_id (nullable), status (enum: new|tenant|not_renting|debtor|troublemaker|blacklisted), gdpr_consent_at (timestamp nullable), gdpr_deleted_at (timestamp nullable), notes, timestamps, soft deletes
Create blacklist table: id, customer_id, reason, added_by (user_id), added_at, removed_at (nullable), removed_by (user_id nullable), timestamps
Create customer_documents table: id, customer_id, document_type (string), path, filename, uploaded_by (user_id), timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: applications, waiting list, waiting list notifications
userStories.description: As a developer, I need application intake and waiting list tables so the pre-contract flow is tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Create applications table: id, park_id, customer_id, unit_type_id, unit_id (nullable), desired_start_date, status (enum: new|in_progress|waiting|completed|declined), assigned_to (user_id nullable), credit_check_path (nullable), notes, source (enum: walk_in|phone|online|referral), timestamps
Create waiting_list table: id, park_id, customer_id, unit_type_id, priority_score (int default 0), notes, notified_at (nullable), converted_application_id (nullable), timestamps, soft deletes
Create waiting_list_notifications table: id, waiting_list_id, unit_id, sent_at, method (email|sms), response (enum: interested|not_interested|no_response), timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: contracts, contract signatures, contract renewals
userStories.description: As a developer, I need contract tables covering the full lifecycle from draft to termination.
acceptanceCriteria: Create contracts table: id, application_id (nullable), customer_id, unit_id, start_date, end_date (nullable), notice_period_days (int default 30), rent_amount, deposit_amount, insurance_amount (decimal default 0), status (enum: draft|awaiting_signature|signed|active|terminated_by_customer|terminated_by_lfg|declined|expired), signed_pdf_path (nullable), signed_at (nullable), terminated_at (nullable), termination_reason_id (nullable FK reference_items), termination_notice_date (nullable), timestamps, soft deletes
Create contract_signatures table: id, contract_id, signer_type (enum: customer|lfg), signer_name, signed_at, ip_address, esign_provider_id (nullable), timestamps
Create contract_renewals table: id, contract_id, new_contract_id, renewed_at, new_rent_amount, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: deposits
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a dedicated deposits table to track tenant deposit funds separately from invoices.
acceptanceCriteria: Create deposits table: id, contract_id, customer_id, park_id, amount, status (enum: pending|received|held|returned|partially_returned|forfeited), received_at (nullable), returned_at (nullable), return_amount (decimal nullable), deduction_amount (decimal nullable), deduction_reason (nullable), return_method (enum: bank_transfer|mollie_payout nullable), mollie_payment_id (nullable), timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: invoices, invoice items, payments, dunning
userStories.description: As a developer, I need billing and dunning tables so financial flows are fully tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Create invoices table: id, contract_id (nullable), customer_id, park_id, invoice_number (string unique), issue_date, due_date, subtotal, tax_rate (decimal default 0), tax_amount, total_amount, status (enum: draft|sent|paid|partially_paid|overdue|cancelled), pdf_path (nullable), sent_at (nullable), paid_at (nullable), cancelled_at (nullable), timestamps, soft deletes
Create invoice_items table: id, invoice_id, description, quantity (decimal), unit_price, total, item_type (enum: rent|deposit|insurance|electricity|damage|dunning_fee|discount|other), sort_order

Create payments table: id, invoice_id, amount, currency (default EUR), payment_method (enum: mollie|bank_transfer|cash|sepa_direct_debit), mollie_payment_id (nullable), mollie_checkout_url (nullable), status (enum: pending|paid|failed|refunded|cancelled), paid_at (nullable), failure_reason (nullable), timestamps
Create dunning_records table: id, invoice_id, customer_id, level (int 1-3), sent_at, fee_amount (decimal), template_used (nullable), timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: damage reports, damage photos, vendors
userStories.description: As a developer, I need damage and vendor tables so property damage is tracked and repair assignments managed.
acceptanceCriteria: Create damage_reports table: id, unit_id, contract_id (nullable), reported_by (user_id), description, estimated_cost (decimal nullable), actual_cost (decimal nullable), status (enum: reported|in_assessment|repair_ordered|in_repair|resolved|closed), assigned_vendor_id (nullable), resolved_at (nullable), timestamps, soft deletes
Create damage_photos table: id, damage_report_id, path, caption, taken_at (nullable), timestamps
Create vendors table: id, park_id (nullable — null means all parks), name, contact_name, phone, email, specialty (string), hourly_rate (decimal nullable), active (bool), timestamps, soft deletes
Create vendor_invoices table: id, vendor_id, damage_report_id (nullable), amount, paid_at (nullable), pdf_path (nullable), timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: electricity meters, readings, pricing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need electricity metering tables so consumption-based billing is accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Create electricity_meters table: id, unit_id, meter_number (string), meter_type (enum: main|sub), active, installed_at, timestamps

Create electricity_readings table: id, meter_id, reading_date, reading_value (decimal), photo_path (nullable), recorded_by (user_id), consumption (decimal nullable computed from previous reading), timestamps
Create electricity_pricing table: id, park_id, price_per_kwh (decimal), valid_from, valid_to (nullable), timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: tasks, notifications, audit log
userStories.description: As a developer, I need task, notification, and audit tables to support workflow and compliance tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tasks table: id, park_id, type (enum: application|damage|ticket|general|inspection|renewal), title, description, assigned_to (user_id nullable), created_by (user_id), status (enum: todo|in_progress|done|cancelled), due_date (nullable), priority (enum: low|medium|high|urgent), related_type (nullable), related_id (nullable), completed_at (nullable), timestamps, soft deletes
Create notifications table: id, user_id, type, title, body, related_type (nullable), related_id (nullable), read_at (nullable), timestamps
Create audit_logs table: id, user_id (nullable), action, model_type, model_id, old_values (JSON nullable), new_values (JSON nullable), ip_address, user_agent, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: mail templates, sent mail log, document templates
userStories.description: As a developer, I need communication template tables so emails and documents can be generated dynamically.
acceptanceCriteria: Create mail_templates table: id, park_id (nullable), name, subject, body_html, template_type (enum: welcome|contract|invoice|dunning_1|dunning_2|dunning_3|termination|deposit_return|waiting_list|custom), variables_json, active, timestamps

Create sent_emails table: id, customer_id (nullable), recipient_email, subject, body_html, template_id (nullable), sent_by (user_id nullable), status (enum: queued|sent|failed|bounced), sent_at (nullable), error_message (nullable), timestamps

Create document_templates table: id, park_id (nullable), name, document_type (enum: rental_contract|invoice|termination_letter|dunning_letter|deposit_return|welcome_letter), template_html, variables_json, version (int), active, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: discount rules, insurance options, revenue targets, system settings
userStories.description: As a developer, I need configuration tables for discounts, insurance, targets, and system-wide settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Create discount_rules table: id, park_id (nullable), unit_type_id (nullable), name, discount_type (enum: percentage|fixed), discount_value (decimal), applies_from_month (int), applies_to_month (int nullable), active, timestamps
Create insurance_options table: id, park_id (nullable), unit_type_id (nullable), name, provider, monthly_premium (decimal), coverage_amount (decimal), active, timestamps
Create revenue_targets table: id, park_id, year, month, target_amount (decimal), timestamps

Create system_settings table: id, key (string unique), value, description, timestamps (seed defaults: invoice_day=1, dunning_delay_1=7, dunning_delay_2=14, dunning_delay_3=30, payment_retry_max=3, session_timeout_minutes=60, login_max_attempts=5)
Create llm_access_codes table: id, park_id, code, description, valid_from, valid_to (nullable), active, timestamps
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DB schema: reference items, employees
userStories.description: As a developer, I need reference/lookup tables and employee records for consistent data across the system.
acceptanceCriteria: Create reference_items table: id, category (enum: country|city|document_type|termination_reason|damage_category|unit_feature|industry_sector), value, label, sort_order, active, timestamps — seed common German states/cities and standard termination reasons
Create employees table: id, user_id (nullable FK), park_id (nullable), first_name, last_name, email, phone, role_title, hire_date, active, timestamps, soft deletes
Run migrations without error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Laravel auth API: login, logout, refresh, password reset
userStories.description: As any user, I want secure JWT auth endpoints so the frontend can authenticate sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/login: validates email+password, returns access_token and user object with role+parks
POST /api/auth/logout: revokes current token
POST /api/auth/refresh: issues new token if current valid
POST /api/auth/forgot-password: sends reset link email
POST /api/auth/reset-password: validates token, updates password
Account locked (active=false) after N failed attempts (from system_settings login_max_attempts)
All routes return consistent JSON error format: {message, errors?}
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Auth: Two-factor authentication (TOTP) API
userStories.description: As any user, I want to set up and verify TOTP 2FA so my account has a second security layer.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/2fa/setup: generates TOTP secret and QR code URI for authenticator app
POST /api/auth/2fa/enable: validates first TOTP code and marks 2FA active on user
POST /api/auth/2fa/verify: validates TOTP code during login (step 2 after password)
POST /api/auth/2fa/disable: disables 2FA with password confirmation
Login flow: if user has 2FA enabled, /login returns {requires_2fa: true, temp_token} instead of full access_token
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: RBAC middleware and park-scoping middleware
userStories.description: As a developer, I need reusable RBAC and park-scope middleware so all API routes are access-controlled without repeating logic.
acceptanceCriteria: RoleMiddleware: checks authenticated user role against allowed roles list, returns 403 if unauthorized
ParkScopeMiddleware: for requests with park_id param or body field, verifies user has access to that park (admin/main_manager bypass), returns 403 if not
Helper method hasAccessToPark(user, parkId): returns bool
Middleware registered in app/Http/Kernel.php as named middleware
Unit tests for both middleware
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin: User and employee management API
userStories.description: As an Admin, I want CRUD endpoints for users and employees so access is controlled and auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/admin/users: paginated list with role/active filters
POST /api/admin/users: create user, auto-send welcome email with temp password
PUT /api/admin/users/{id}: update name, email, role, active
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/parks: sync park assignments (array of park_ids)
GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/employees
DELETE /api/admin/users/{id}: soft-delete (deactivate, not destroy)
All mutations written to audit_logs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Park management API (CRUD, logo upload, settings)
userStories.description: As a Main Manager, I want park CRUD and configuration endpoints so each location is fully set up.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/parks: list scoped to user's parks
POST /api/parks, PUT /api/parks/{id}, DELETE /api/parks/{id} (soft delete)
POST /api/parks/{id}/logo: multipart upload, store to S3, update parks.logo_path
GET /api/parks/{id}/settings: returns park + system_settings for this park
PUT /api/parks/{id}/settings: update park-level setting overrides
Mutations logged to audit_logs
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Unit types API (CRUD, floor plans, features)
userStories.description: As a Main Manager, I want unit type CRUD including floor plan uploads and feature assignment.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/parks/{parkId}/unit-types
POST /api/unit-types/{id}/floor-plan: upload PDF, store to S3
POST /api/unit-types/{id}/features: sync features array
GET /api/unit-types/{id}/availability: returns count of free units of this type
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Units API (CRUD, status transitions, photos, rental history)
userStories.description: As a Rental Manager, I want unit CRUD and lifecycle management via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/parks/{parkId}/units: paginated, filter by status/unit_type
POST /api/parks/{parkId}/units, PUT /api/units/{id}, DELETE /api/units/{id} (soft delete)
PUT /api/units/{id}/status: validates transitions (free→reserved→rented requires contract; rented→free requires terminated contract)
POST /api/units/{id}/photos: multipart, store to S3, returns photo record
DELETE /api/units/{id}/photos/{photoId}
GET /api/units/{id}/history: list of past contracts with customer name, dates, rent
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Discount rules and insurance options API
userStories.description: As a Main Manager, I want to configure discount rules and insurance options per park or unit type via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/parks/{parkId}/discount-rules
GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/parks/{parkId}/insurance-options
GET /api/unit-types/{id}/discount-rules: returns applicable discounts for a unit type
GET /api/unit-types/{id}/insurance-options: returns available insurance for a unit type
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Customer API (CRUD, document upload, GDPR delete, blacklist)
userStories.description: As a Rental Manager, I want full customer lifecycle management via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/customers: paginated, filter by park/status, search by name/email/id_number
POST /api/customers, PUT /api/customers/{id}, DELETE /api/customers/{id} (soft delete)
POST /api/customers/{id}/documents: upload ID/contract/proof doc to S3
GET /api/customers/{id}/documents: list with download URLs
DELETE /api/customers/{id}/documents/{docId}
POST /api/customers/{id}/gdpr-delete: anonymize name/email/phone/dob/id_number, set gdpr_deleted_at, retain invoice/payment records
POST /api/customers/{id}/blacklist: create blacklist entry
DELETE /api/customers/{id}/blacklist: set removed_at on latest entry
GET /api/customers/blacklist: paginated blacklist
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Application workflow API (CRUD, status, assign, credit check, convert)
userStories.description: As an Office Worker, I want application management endpoints covering the full intake flow.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/applications: paginated, filter by park/status/assigned_to, search by customer
POST /api/applications, PUT /api/applications/{id}, DELETE /api/applications/{id}
PUT /api/applications/{id}/status: validate transition new→in_progress→waiting→completed|declined
POST /api/applications/{id}/assign: set assigned_to user
POST /api/applications/{id}/credit-check: call Credit Bureau stub/adapter, store PDF result, return check summary
POST /api/applications/{id}/waiting-list: move to waiting list (status→waiting, create waiting_list record)
POST /api/applications/{id}/convert: assign unit, prepare contract draft, status→completed
Auto-send acknowledgment email on application creation using welcome mail template
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Waiting list API (CRUD, notify, convert to application)
userStories.description: As a Rental Manager, I want waiting list management so demand is captured and served when units free up.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/parks/{parkId}/waiting-list: list sorted by priority_score desc then created_at asc
POST /api/parks/{parkId}/waiting-list, PUT /api/waiting-list/{id}, DELETE /api/waiting-list/{id}
POST /api/waiting-list/{id}/notify: send notification email to customer about available unit, create waiting_list_notifications record
POST /api/waiting-list/{id}/convert: create new application from waiting list entry, set converted_application_id
Auto-trigger: when unit status changes to free, find matching waiting list entries by unit_type and send notifications (queued job)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Contract API (generate PDF, e-sign flow, activate, terminate, renew)
userStories.description: As a Rental Manager, I want contract lifecycle management from generation to termination via API.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/applications/{id}/contract: generate PDF from document template, create contract record in draft status
GET /api/contracts: paginated, filter by status/park/customer
GET /api/contracts/{id}, PUT /api/contracts/{id}
POST /api/contracts/{id}/send-for-signature: call e-sign provider adapter (DocuSign/HelloSign stub), update status→awaiting_signature
POST /api/webhooks/esign: receive signature webhook, store signed PDF, update status→signed, create contract_signature record
POST /api/contracts/{id}/activate: status→active, unit status→rented, create deposit record
POST /api/contracts/{id}/terminate: validate termination date >= notice period, status→terminated_by_customer or terminated_by_lfg, queue final invoice generation
POST /api/contracts/{id}/renew: create new contract linked via contract_renewals, old contract status→expired
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Deposit management API (track, process return, Mollie payout)
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want deposit tracking and return processing via API so tenant funds are handled correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/contracts/{id}/deposit: get deposit record
PUT /api/deposits/{id}/received: mark deposit as received with received_at date
POST /api/deposits/{id}/return: calculate return amount (deposit minus deductions), set return_amount, deduction_amount, deduction_reason, status→returned|partially_returned
POST /api/deposits/{id}/mollie-payout: create Mollie payment to customer IBAN for return amount
GET /api/deposits: paginated list filter by park/status
Deposit status transitions validated (can only return if contract terminated)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: PDF generation service (contracts, invoices, documents)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable PDF generation service so all documents are consistently rendered.
acceptanceCriteria: Create PdfService class using Laravel-Browsershot or dompdf
PdfService::generateContract(contract): renders document_template with contract variables, returns PDF binary
PdfService::generateInvoice(invoice): renders invoice template with line items, totals, park branding
PdfService::generateDunningLetter(dunning_record): renders dunning template for given level
PdfService::generateDepositReturn(deposit): renders deposit return document
All PDFs stored to S3, path saved to relevant model
Template variables: {customer_name}, {unit_number}, {rent_amount}, {start_date}, {park_name}, {park_logo_url}, {invoice_number}, etc.
Tests pass (mock S3)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Invoice generation API (monthly auto-generate, manual, DATEV export)
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want invoice generation endpoints with DATEV export support.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/invoices: create manual invoice with customer, contract (optional), line items, due_date
POST /api/invoices/generate-monthly: queued job — for all active contracts generates rent invoice with applicable discounts and electricity charges, fires on configured invoice_day each month
GET /api/invoices: paginated, filter by park/status/customer/date range
GET /api/invoices/{id}/pdf: stream signed PDF
POST /api/invoices/{id}/send: email PDF to customer using invoice mail template
POST /api/invoices/{id}/cancel: status→cancelled, create credit note line
GET /api/invoices/datev-export?park_id=&from=&to=: return EXTF CSV format for DATEV import
Invoice number format: {PARK_CODE}-{YEAR}-{SEQ} auto-incremented per park per year
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Mollie payment API (payment links, webhooks, refunds, retries)
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want Mollie integrated for payment collection and reconciliation.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/invoices/{id}/payment-link: create Mollie payment, return checkout URL, set payment record status→pending
POST /api/webhooks/mollie: verify webhook signature, update payment status (paid→invoice paid, failed→trigger retry logic)
Retry logic: on payment failure, queue retry after 24h up to system_settings.payment_retry_max attempts
POST /api/payments/{id}/refund: initiate Mollie refund for a payment
GET /api/payments: paginated list filter by park/status/method/date
Idempotency: duplicate webhook events for same mollie_payment_id are ignored
Tests pass (Mollie sandbox mock)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Dunning automation: scheduler, escalation, dunning API
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want automated dunning escalation with manual override endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Laravel scheduled command runs daily: finds overdue invoices, escalates dunning level based on system_settings delays
On each escalation: create dunning_records entry, add dunning fee invoice item, send email via dunning mail template for that level, update customer status→debtor
GET /api/debtors?park_id=: list all customers with overdue invoices, total owed, current dunning level, days overdue
POST /api/debtors/{customerId}/pause: set flag preventing auto-escalation for 30 days
POST /api/debtors/{customerId}/escalate: manually jump to next dunning level immediately
POST /api/debtors/{customerId}/resolve: mark all invoices paid/waived, reset dunning, update customer status
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Damage reports API (CRUD, status, photos, vendor assignment, damage invoice)
userStories.description: As a Park Worker, I want damage report management via API including vendor assignment and billing.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/damage-reports: paginated, filter by park/status/unit
POST /api/damage-reports, PUT /api/damage-reports/{id}, DELETE /api/damage-reports/{id}
POST /api/damage-reports/{id}/photos: upload to S3
PUT /api/damage-reports/{id}/status: validate transitions reported→in_assessment→repair_ordered→in_repair→resolved→closed
POST /api/damage-reports/{id}/assign-vendor: set assigned_vendor_id, notify vendor by email
POST /api/damage-reports/{id}/invoice: generate damage invoice for the tenant's contract
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Electricity metering API (meters CRUD, readings, billing charge)
userStories.description: As a Park Worker, I want electricity meters and readings managed via API so consumption is billed.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/units/{unitId}/meters
POST /api/meters/{id}/readings: record reading with date, value, optional photo upload
GET /api/meters/{id}/readings: list readings with computed consumption (current - previous value)
POST /api/meters/{id}/readings/{readingId}/bill: compute charge (consumption × price_per_kwh from pricing table), create invoice item on next open invoice or new invoice
GET /api/parks/{parkId}/electricity-pricing: list pricing periods
POST /api/parks/{parkId}/electricity-pricing: create new pricing period (valid_from today, close previous)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Vendor management API (CRUD, vendor invoices)
userStories.description: As a Main Manager, I want to manage vendors and their invoices so repair costs are tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/vendors (filter by park)
GET/POST/PUT /api/vendors/{id}/invoices
POST /api/vendors/{id}/invoices/{invoiceId}/pay: mark vendor invoice as paid, record in accounts
GET /api/vendors/{id}/damage-reports: list damage reports assigned to this vendor
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Task management API (CRUD, status, assignment, related entities)
userStories.description: As any manager, I want task CRUD with assignment and entity linking via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/tasks: paginated, filter by park/status/assigned_to/type/priority
POST /api/tasks, PUT /api/tasks/{id}, DELETE /api/tasks/{id}
PUT /api/tasks/{id}/status: todo→in_progress→done (set completed_at on done)
POST /api/tasks/{id}/assign: change assigned_to, send in-app notification to new assignee
GET /api/tasks/dashboard: returns tasks for Kanban widget (park_worker only sees own tasks)
GET /api/tasks/calendar: returns tasks with due_date for calendar widget
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Mail system API (templates CRUD, send individual, mass mailing, schedule)
userStories.description: As an Office Worker, I want mail management endpoints so tenant communication is efficient.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/mail-templates
POST /api/mail/preview: render template with sample variables, return HTML
POST /api/mail/send: send individual email to customer using template with variable substitution, log to sent_emails
POST /api/mail/mass-send: filter recipients by park_id, customer status, contract type; queue SendMailJob for each, log to sent_emails
POST /api/mail/schedule: create scheduled mass mailing (stored as queued job with delay)
GET /api/mail/sent: paginated log of sent emails with status
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Document templates API and system settings API

POST /api/document-templates/{id}/clone: create new version of template
GET/PUT /api/system-settings: get and update key/value system settings
GET /api/system-settings/{key}: get single setting value
Settings changes logged to audit_logs

POST/PUT/DELETE /api/parks/{parkId}/access-codes
POST /api/parks/{parkId}/access-codes/sync: push active codes to LLM lock system via REST adapter

userStories.title: In-app notification API and global search API
userStories.description: As any user, I want in-app notifications and global search endpoints so I'm aware of events and can find records fast.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/notifications: paginated list for current user, filter by read/unread
POST /api/notifications/{id}/read: mark single as read
POST /api/notifications/read-all: mark all as read
GET /api/notifications/unread-count: returns integer for badge
GET /api/search?q={query}&park_id=: searches customers (name/email), units (number), applications (customer name), contracts (number), invoices (number); returns top 5 per category

userStories.title: Dashboard KPI and reports API

acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/dashboard/kpis?park_id=: returns new_requests, new_customers, new_invoices_count, free_units, ongoing_contracts, cancellations, problem_clients, inactive_units, debtors_count, max_dunning_level, damages_open, repair_jobs_open — cached 30s
GET /api/dashboard/mahnstuffe?park_id=: debtor rows with customer name, total_owed, dunning_level, days_overdue
GET /api/dashboard/revenue?park_id=: per-park planned vs actual for current month

userStories.title: Vue.js SPA scaffold: project init, router, Pinia stores, axios client, layout shell
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the frontend skeleton with routing, state management, API client, and layout before building screens.
acceptanceCriteria: Vue 3 + Vite + TypeScript + Pinia + Vue Router 4 project initialized in /frontend
Axios instance configured with base URL from env, auto-attach Bearer token from auth store, 401→logout redirect
Auth Pinia store: login(email, password), logout(), user state, role getter, parks getter, token persisted in localStorage
Route meta field 'roles' for RBAC guard: beforeEach checks auth and role, redirects to /login or /403
AppLayout.vue: sidebar nav + top bar wrapper component
Sidebar: all menu items listed, each with route and required role; hidden items not rendered if role lacks access
Top bar: park selector dropdown (parks from auth store), user avatar + name, logout button, notification bell with unread count badge
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Shared UI component library: buttons, badges, table, modal, form inputs, pagination
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a shared component set so all screens are consistent without re-implementing primitives.
acceptanceCriteria: AppButton.vue: variants (primary/secondary/danger/ghost), sizes (sm/md/lg), loading state spinner
StatusBadge.vue: maps status string to color (green=active/paid/free, yellow=in_progress/reserved, red=overdue/blacklisted/damage, gray=inactive/draft)
AppTable.vue: slot-based columns, sortable headers (emit sort event), row click event, empty state slot
AppModal.vue: title, default slot, footer slot, close on backdrop click, close button
AppPagination.vue: prev/next/page buttons, emits page-change
FormInput.vue, FormSelect.vue, FormDatePicker.vue, FormTextarea.vue: label, error message display, v-model
All components typed with TypeScript props
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

acceptanceCriteria: Units tab: park filter; occupancy rate donut chart (rented/total); avg rent per m² metric; table of units sorted by vacancy duration desc; top damaged units list
Finance tab: date range + park filter; revenue vs plan bar chart per month; outstanding debt total metric; payments by method pie chart; top debtors table
Finance tab: DATEV export button with date range modal
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Reports UI: Audit log viewer tab
userStories.description: As an Admin, I want to browse and export the audit log from the Reports section.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit tab (Admin only, hidden for other roles)
Table: user, action, model type, model ID, old values summary, new values summary, IP, timestamp
Filters: user select, model_type select, date range
Click row: expand to show full old/new values JSON diff
Export to CSV button
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Application reports list page and waiting list reports
userStories.description: As a Main Manager, I want dedicated reports pages under the Request module.
acceptanceCriteria: /requests/reports: metrics for current park — total applications, by status breakdown, conversion rate, avg time from new to completed
Filter by date range
Export to Excel
Waiting list summary: total entries, entries by unit type, avg wait duration
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Customer reports and units damage reports pages
userStories.description: As a Main Manager, I want module-level reports for customers and unit damage under their respective menu sections.
acceptanceCriteria: /customers/reports: customer count by status, new customers per month chart, blacklist count, GDPR deletion count
/units/reports: unit count by status, avg vacancy duration per type, damage count by status, repair cost totals
Both pages have park filter and date range filter
Export to Excel on each
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Finance reports and vendor cost reports
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want finance-specific reports under /finance/reports.
acceptanceCriteria: /finance/reports: tabs for Revenue, Debtors, Payments, Vendors
Revenue tab: monthly revenue table (plan vs actual vs diff), year total
Debtors tab: current debtors by level with age buckets (0-30d, 31-60d, 60+d), total owed
Payments tab: payments by method bar chart, success vs failed rate, avg payment time
Vendors tab: total vendor costs per park, by specialty, by month
All tabs: park filter, date range, Excel export
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Error pages, loading states, and empty states
userStories.description: As a developer, I need consistent error, loading, and empty state components for a polished UX.
acceptanceCriteria: /403 page: 'Kein Zugriff' message, back to dashboard button
/404 page: 'Seite nicht gefunden', back to dashboard button
Global error handler in axios: network errors show toast 'Verbindungsfehler, bitte versuche es erneut'
500 API errors: show error toast with error message from API response
Loading skeleton component (AppSkeleton.vue): animated shimmer rows, used in all lists during data fetch
Empty state component (AppEmptyState.vue): icon + message + optional action button slot
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Mobile responsive adjustments
userStories.description: As a user on a tablet, I want the UI to be usable on screens ≥768px so managers can use it on-site.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar collapses to icon-only mode on screens <1024px, toggleable with hamburger button
All AppTable components scroll horizontally on small screens (overflow-x: auto wrapper)
Modals are full-width on screens <640px
KPI card grid on dashboard: 2 columns on tablet, 1 column on mobile
Top bar: park selector and search bar hidden behind mobile menu on <640px
No horizontal overflow on any page at 768px viewport
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: E2E integration: monthly invoice generation scheduled job
userStories.description: As an Accountant, I want the monthly invoice generation job tested end-to-end so billing runs reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Laravel scheduled command GenerateMonthlyInvoices dispatches GenerateInvoiceJob per active contract
Each job: calculates rent (with active discounts), adds electricity charges for unbilled readings, creates invoice record + PDF
Duplicate prevention: idempotency check — skip if invoice already generated for this contract+month
Job failure: logged to failed_jobs, does not block other contracts
Manual trigger endpoint for testing: POST /api/invoices/generate-monthly (Admin only)
Tests: factory-created contracts → run job → assert invoices created with correct amounts
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: E2E integration: contract termination → final invoice → deposit return flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the termination-to-close workflow tested as a complete flow.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/contracts/{id}/terminate: creates pro-rated final invoice for remaining days of last month
Final invoice sent to customer automatically
Unit status set to maintenance (not free) until damage inspection complete
When damage report linked to termination is resolved: unit status transitions to free, waiting list auto-notify triggered
Deposit return can only proceed after final invoice paid or explicitly waived
Tests: factory contract → terminate → assert final invoice, unit status, waiting list notification
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Performance: API response caching and query optimization
userStories.description: As a developer, I need key API endpoints optimized so the system handles 500 concurrent users with <200ms p95 response times.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard KPI endpoint cached with 30-second TTL using Laravel cache (Redis or file)
All list endpoints use Eloquent eager loading (no N+1 queries) — verify with Laravel Telescope or query log in tests

Database indexes added: customers(email), customers(status), units(park_id, status), invoices(customer_id, status, due_date), applications(park_id, status, assigned_to), contracts(customer_id, status)
Reports endpoints paginated — no full table scans without date range filters
Tests: assert dashboard endpoint response time <200ms with 1000 seeded records
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Security hardening: CSRF, rate limiting, input sanitization, file validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need security controls in place so the application meets enterprise security standards.
acceptanceCriteria: Rate limiting: /api/auth/login limited to 10 requests/minute per IP (Laravel ThrottleRequests)
File uploads: validate MIME type and extension whitelist (PDF: contract/docs; JPG/PNG: photos); max size 10MB
Uploaded filenames: sanitized and replaced with UUID-based names before storage
All user-supplied HTML (mail template body) sanitized with HTMLPurifier before storage
Mollie webhook: verify X-Mollie-Signature header before processing
E-sign webhook: verify provider signature header
CORS configured: only allow frontend domain origin
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: GDPR compliance: consent flow, deletion, data export
userStories.description: As a developer, I need GDPR features so the system is legally compliant for German personal data.
acceptanceCriteria: GDPR consent recorded on customer creation with timestamp
POST /api/customers/{id}/gdpr-delete: replaces PII fields with '[gelöscht]' placeholder, sets gdpr_deleted_at, retains all financial records (invoices/payments)
GET /api/customers/{id}/data-export: returns all data held about customer as JSON (for data subject access request)
Deleted customer profile shows anonymized state in UI with 'Daten gelöscht' badge
Soft deletes used throughout — no hard deletes of customer/contract/invoice data
Retention policy: system_settings entry data_retention_years (default 10) — no automated deletion, only manual GDPR delete
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Seeder: demo data for all modules
userStories.description: As a developer, I need comprehensive seed data so the application can be demonstrated and tested without manual setup.
acceptanceCriteria: DatabaseSeeder seeds: 1 Admin user, 2 parks, 3 unit types per park, 20 units per park, 15 customers, 10 active contracts, 5 terminated contracts, 20 invoices (mix of statuses), 5 dunning records, 3 damage reports, 10 tasks, mail templates for all types, document templates for all types, system_settings defaults, reference_items for all categories
php artisan db:seed completes without error
Separate DemoSeeder for CI: minimal data set for tests
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Docker and deployment configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Docker configuration so the application can be deployed consistently to any PaaS.
acceptanceCriteria: Dockerfile for Laravel backend: PHP 8.3-fpm, composer dependencies, storage symlink, queue worker
Dockerfile for Vue.js frontend: Node 20, npm build, nginx to serve dist/
docker-compose.yml for local development: app (Laravel), frontend (Vite dev server), mysql, redis, mailhog, minio (S3 compatible)
.env.example with all required variables: DB_*, REDIS_*, MAIL_*, AWS_* (minio), MOLLIE_API_KEY, ESIGN_*, CREDIT_BUREAU_*, LLM_API_*
GitHub Actions CI: run php artisan test + vitest on push to main
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: API documentation (OpenAPI / Swagger)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want auto-generated API documentation so frontend developers and integrators can reference all endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Laravel package (l5-swagger or Scramble) configured to generate OpenAPI 3.0 spec from code annotations or reflection
All routes documented with request/response schemas
Swagger UI accessible at /api/documentation (protected by Admin auth in production)
Typecheck passes
